meta.note: Louisiana geography-aware weighted poststratified crosstabs; shares in percent.

registered_voter_correction.source_note: Temporary website-side Louisiana registered-voter correction. Keep the 41% turnout-adjusted active weights, but rescale count denominators from 1,533,491 to 2,874,643 for generated voter-count outputs only. Remove this correction once upstream Louisiana weights are regenerated with the corrected registered-voter denominator.

delivery.r2_ready_note: Optional future offload seam: set meta.delivery.asset_host_base_url to an R2/public bucket base URL and keep relative shard paths in manifest.

modes.label: What respondents with a view said

response_universe.explainer: In "What respondents with a view said", we remove "Never heard of / Can't rate" responses and rescale the remaining responses to sum to 100%.
